tests.name: test_ac04_resource_single_schema
tests.description: AC-04: GET /api/resource/User/Administrator → {data: dict with name}.

tests.name: test_ac10_msic_code_record_schema
tests.description: AC-10: LHDN MSIC Code record has expected fields (name, code, description).

tests.name: test_ac11_salary_slip_fields_present
tests.description: AC-11: Salary Slip list records include employee and gross_pay.

tests.name: test_ac12_employee_has_required_fields
tests.description: AC-12: Employee list records include name, employee_name, company.

tests.name: test_ac13_workspace_record_has_name
tests.description: AC-13: Workspace list records have 'name' field.

tests.name: test_ac14_resubmission_log_schema
tests.description: AC-14: LHDN Resubmission Log has expected fields if records exist.

tests.name: test_ac15_report_list_schema
tests.description: AC-15: Report list records have name and report_type.

tests.name: test_ac16_company_has_lhdn_tin_field
tests.description: AC-16: Company record includes custom_company_tin_number field.

tests.name: test_ac05_send_message_top_level_schema
tests.description: AC-05: send_message → top-level JSON has 'message' key.

tests.name: test_ac06_send_message_response_is_string_or_dict
tests.description: AC-06: send_message 'message' value is str or dict (not None or list).

tests.name: test_ac07_get_api_key_info_schema
tests.description: AC-07: get_api_key_info → {message: dict or string} with no raw key.

tests.name: test_ac08_error_response_has_exc_type
tests.description: AC-08: API errors include 'exc_type' field (Frappe error convention).

tests.name: test_ac09_settings_doctype_fields
tests.description: AC-09: Prisma AI Settings response includes expected field names.

tests.name: test_reg13_admin_first_name_not_tampered
tests.description:
REG-13: Administrator first_name is not 'Hacked'.

Regression: CSRF test SEC-06 could leave first_name as 'Hacked' if
tearDown() failed to restore it.

tests.name: test_reg14_lhdn_dev_tools_getpage_returns_script
tests.description:
REG-14: LHDN Dev Tools page getpage response includes page script.

Regression: Page was blank because triple-nested directory structure
prevented Frappe from finding lhdn_dev_tools.js.
Fix: page files moved to correct double-nested module path.
Note: getpage returns data in frappe.response.docs[], not message.

tests.name: test_reg15_lhdn_workspace_exists_in_database
tests.description:
REG-15: LHDN Payroll workspace exists in the Workspace table.

Regression: Workspace was deleted/missing from DB. The desk home page
showed an LHDN Payroll tile from cache, but clicking it showed
'Icon is not correctly configured'. The workspace record needs to
be recreated via sync_fixtures or bench migrate.

tests.name: test_reg16_hrms_bundle_not_404
tests.description:
REG-16: hrms.bundle.js and hrms.bundle.css are served (not 404).

Regression: HRMS assets returned 404 because bench build wasn't
run after HRMS app installation.

error.message: HRMS bundles not found at expected paths. Main: JS=404 CSS=404, Alt: JS=404 CSS=404. Run: bench build --app hrms

tests.name: test_reg17_salary_slip_custom_fields_via_api
tests.description:
REG-17: Salary Slip custom fields are queryable via Custom Field API.

Regression: Tests originally used frappe.client.get on DocType which
doesn't return custom fields. Must query Custom Field doctype instead.

tests.name: test_reg18_statutory_deduction_fields_exist
tests.description:
REG-18: All 7 statutory deduction fields exist on Salary Slip.

Regression: Fields custom_pcb_amount, custom_epf_employee, etc. were
missing from custom_field.json fixture, causing LP-08 to LP-11 failures.

tests.name: test_reg19_socket_io_not_blocking_page_render
tests.description:
REG-19: socket.io connection failure doesn't break page rendering.

Regression: WebSocket 'Unauthorized' error was logged but shouldn't
prevent page content from loading.

tests.name: test_reg06_lhdn_workspace_has_4_shortcuts
tests.description:
REG-06: LHDN Payroll workspace has at least 4 shortcuts.

Regression: After workspace fixture deploy, shortcuts disappeared if
bench migrate was used instead of sync_fixtures().

tests.name: test_reg07_msic_code_fixture_loaded
tests.description:
REG-07: LHDN MSIC Code master data has records (fixtures loaded).

Regression: After fresh bench migrate, fixtures weren't loaded automatically.
Fix: use 'bench --site frontend sync_fixtures'.

tests.name: test_reg08_salary_slip_lhdn_fields_not_breaking_submit
tests.description:
REG-08: Salary Slip meta loads without Python error.

Regression: When a custom field had a bad default value, loading
the DocType meta threw a 500.

tests.name: test_reg09_dev_tools_page_not_missing
tests.description:
REG-09: lhdn_dev_tools desk page exists.

Regression: After clearing sites/assets, the page JS was missing
because it was only in the backend container.

tests.name: test_reg10_resubmit_to_lhdn_method_signature
test_reg11_nginx_serves_after_restart
tests.description:
REG-11: nginx returns 200 (not 502) after container restart.

Regression: nginx cached stale backend DNS → 502 Bad Gateway.
Fix: restart frontend container after backend restart.

tests.name: test_reg12_prisma_assistant_module_correct
tests.description:
REG-12: Prisma AI Settings doctype is in 'Prisma Assistant' module.

Regression: After extraction from lhdn_payroll_integration, the
doctype was briefly left in 'LHDN Payroll Integration' module.

tests.name: test_reg01_desk_widget_js_served
tests.description:
REG-01: desk_widget.js is served from /assets/prisma_assistant/js/.

Regression: After hot-deploy the asset must be in the FRONTEND container.
Failure = assets copied to backend container only (wrong container).

tests.name: test_reg02_desk_widget_css_served
tests.description:
REG-02: desk_widget.css is served from /assets/prisma_assistant/css/.

Regression: Same container bug as REG-01.

tests.name: test_reg03_chat_api_not_500_on_missing_key
tests.description:
REG-03: send_message with no AI key configured returns graceful error, not 500.

Regression: When api_key is empty/unconfigured, old code threw an unhandled
AttributeError that became HTTP 500. Should return 200 with error message.

tests.name: test_reg04_fallback_provider_fields_in_settings
tests.description:
REG-04: Settings doctype has fallback_base_url field (added in feature/prisma-assistant-v2).

Regression: fallback_base_url was missing before PR #aa57961.

tests.name: test_reg05_get_api_key_info_returns_masked_not_raw
tests.description:
REG-05: get_api_key_info never returns the raw API key value.

Regression: Early version of the endpoint accidentally returned the
unencrypted key in the 'preview' field.

tests.name: test_int09_chat_with_erp_question
tests.description: INT-09: AI answers a business question about ERPNext.

tests.name: test_int10_chat_preserves_conversation
tests.description: INT-10: Second message with history receives context-aware reply.

error.message: AI provider unavailable/rate-limited — INT-10 skipped. Reply: {'error': 'ai request failed: http error 429: too many requests'}

tests.name: test_int11_api_key_info_after_chat
tests.description: INT-11: get_api_key_info works immediately after a send_message call.

tests.name: test_int12_settings_persist_across_requests

tests.description: SEC-01: Anonymous GET to frappe.auth.get_logged_user → not 200.

tests.description: SEC-02: Anonymous GET to Salary Slip list → 403 or redirect.

tests.description: SEC-03: Anonymous call to send_message → not 200.

tests.name: test_sec06_post_without_csrf_fails
tests.description:
SEC-06: Unauthenticated POST to set_value is blocked (401/403).

Frappe v16 does not always reject absent CSRF headers for authenticated
sessions, but it DOES block unauthenticated mutating requests.  Testing
the latter gives a reliable, non-destructive security signal.

tests.name: test_sec07_csrf_token_not_in_error_response
tests.description: SEC-07: Error responses do not leak CSRF tokens in body.

tests.name: test_sec08_api_key_not_in_error_logs
tests.description: SEC-08: Error responses from chat API don't contain API keys.

tests.name: test_sec09_sql_injection_in_filter
tests.description: SEC-09: SQL injection in filter parameter doesn't dump data.

tests.name: test_sec10_sql_injection_in_search
tests.description: SEC-10: SQL injection in search_term is escaped.

tests.name: test_sec11_xss_in_chat_message

tests.name: test_sec12_path_traversal_in_resource

all_results.name: test_reg13_admin_first_name_not_tampered
all_results.description:
REG-13: Administrator first_name is not 'Hacked'.

Regression: CSRF test SEC-06 could leave first_name as 'Hacked' if
tearDown() failed to restore it.

all_results.name: test_reg14_lhdn_dev_tools_getpage_returns_script
all_results.description:
REG-14: LHDN Dev Tools page getpage response includes page script.

Regression: Page was blank because triple-nested directory structure
prevented Frappe from finding lhdn_dev_tools.js.
Fix: page files moved to correct double-nested module path.
Note: getpage returns data in frappe.response.docs[], not message.

all_results.name: test_reg15_lhdn_workspace_exists_in_database
all_results.description:
REG-15: LHDN Payroll workspace exists in the Workspace table.

Regression: Workspace was deleted/missing from DB. The desk home page
showed an LHDN Payroll tile from cache, but clicking it showed
'Icon is not correctly configured'. The workspace record needs to
be recreated via sync_fixtures or bench migrate.

all_results.name: test_reg16_hrms_bundle_not_404
all_results.description:
REG-16: hrms.bundle.js and hrms.bundle.css are served (not 404).

Regression: HRMS assets returned 404 because bench build wasn't
run after HRMS app installation.

error.message: HRMS bundles not found at expected paths. Main: JS=404 CSS=404, Alt: JS=404 CSS=404. Run: bench build --app hrms

all_results.name: test_reg17_salary_slip_custom_fields_via_api
all_results.description:
REG-17: Salary Slip custom fields are queryable via Custom Field API.

Regression: Tests originally used frappe.client.get on DocType which
doesn't return custom fields. Must query Custom Field doctype instead.

all_results.name: test_reg18_statutory_deduction_fields_exist
all_results.description:
REG-18: All 7 statutory deduction fields exist on Salary Slip.

Regression: Fields custom_pcb_amount, custom_epf_employee, etc. were
missing from custom_field.json fixture, causing LP-08 to LP-11 failures.

all_results.name: test_reg19_socket_io_not_blocking_page_render
all_results.description:
REG-19: socket.io connection failure doesn't break page rendering.

Regression: WebSocket 'Unauthorized' error was logged but shouldn't
prevent page content from loading.

all_results.name: test_reg06_lhdn_workspace_has_4_shortcuts
all_results.description:
REG-06: LHDN Payroll workspace has at least 4 shortcuts.

Regression: After workspace fixture deploy, shortcuts disappeared if
bench migrate was used instead of sync_fixtures().

all_results.name: test_reg07_msic_code_fixture_loaded
all_results.description:
REG-07: LHDN MSIC Code master data has records (fixtures loaded).

Regression: After fresh bench migrate, fixtures weren't loaded automatically.
Fix: use 'bench --site frontend sync_fixtures'.

all_results.name: test_reg08_salary_slip_lhdn_fields_not_breaking_submit
all_results.description:
REG-08: Salary Slip meta loads without Python error.

Regression: When a custom field had a bad default value, loading
the DocType meta threw a 500.

all_results.name: test_reg09_dev_tools_page_not_missing
all_results.description:
REG-09: lhdn_dev_tools desk page exists.

Regression: After clearing sites/assets, the page JS was missing
because it was only in the backend container.

all_results.name: test_reg10_resubmit_to_lhdn_method_signature
test_reg11_nginx_serves_after_restart
all_results.description:
REG-11: nginx returns 200 (not 502) after container restart.

Regression: nginx cached stale backend DNS → 502 Bad Gateway.
Fix: restart frontend container after backend restart.

all_results.name: test_reg12_prisma_assistant_module_correct
all_results.description:
REG-12: Prisma AI Settings doctype is in 'Prisma Assistant' module.

Regression: After extraction from lhdn_payroll_integration, the
doctype was briefly left in 'LHDN Payroll Integration' module.

all_results.name: test_reg01_desk_widget_js_served
all_results.description:
REG-01: desk_widget.js is served from /assets/prisma_assistant/js/.

Regression: After hot-deploy the asset must be in the FRONTEND container.
Failure = assets copied to backend container only (wrong container).

all_results.name: test_reg02_desk_widget_css_served
all_results.description:
REG-02: desk_widget.css is served from /assets/prisma_assistant/css/.

Regression: Same container bug as REG-01.

all_results.name: test_reg03_chat_api_not_500_on_missing_key
all_results.description:
REG-03: send_message with no AI key configured returns graceful error, not 500.

Regression: When api_key is empty/unconfigured, old code threw an unhandled
AttributeError that became HTTP 500. Should return 200 with error message.

all_results.name: test_reg04_fallback_provider_fields_in_settings
all_results.description:
REG-04: Settings doctype has fallback_base_url field (added in feature/prisma-assistant-v2).

Regression: fallback_base_url was missing before PR #aa57961.

all_results.name: test_reg05_get_api_key_info_returns_masked_not_raw
all_results.description:
REG-05: get_api_key_info never returns the raw API key value.

Regression: Early version of the endpoint accidentally returned the
unencrypted key in the 'preview' field.

all_results.name: test_sec06_post_without_csrf_fails
all_results.description:
SEC-06: Unauthenticated POST to set_value is blocked (401/403).

Frappe v16 does not always reject absent CSRF headers for authenticated
sessions, but it DOES block unauthenticated mutating requests.  Testing
the latter gives a reliable, non-destructive security signal.
